app.title: Ore Calculator
app.supercellDisclaimer: This material is unofficial and is not endorsed by Supercell. For more information see Supercell's Fan Content Policy: www.supercell.com/fan-content-policy.
app.description: Stop guessing, start upgrading! OreCalc helps you manage your equipment and ores with ease. Forecast your income, schedule your next big upgrade on the calendar, and optimize your path to victory. Whether you're a casual player or a maxxer, we've got your back.

player.dataNotFound: Player data not found. Please enter a valid tag or click Load.
player.qrScanInstruction: Use your device camera to scan a QR code. The app will reload with the imported data.
player.qrDisplayInstruction: Scan this QR code with another device to import your data.
player.label: Player
player.apiTokenHint: Hint: You can find your API Token in game under Settings > More Settings > API Token.
player.protectedTagNote: In order to load the data for this player tag, you must prove your ownership.
player.disclaimer: By loading a player tag, you agree to our Terms of Use and acknowledge our Privacy Policy. Player data is retrieved from the Clash of Clans API.

ores.tooltipReached: The amount of ore that will be reached before the bottleneck is removed for this upgrade.
ores.tooltipBottleneck: The bottleneck for this upgrade would be: {bottleneck}.
ores.modalStoredOresPrompt: Please enter the amount of ores you have in your blacksmith
ores.dontAskTwoMonthsDesc: Mute this stored ores reminder modal for the next two months.
ores.autoPredictDesc: Predict stored ores using in-game upgrades activity.

starBonus.title: Star Bonus
starBonus.eventFrequencyInfo: How often the event occurs (e.g., 1 = monthly, 2 = every 2 months).
starBonus.lastEventInfo: Select the last month this event occurred.
starBonus.planningStartInfo: Planning is only available starting from Town Hall {th}.

clanWar.title: Clan War
clanWar.shinyBonusAriaLabel: Clan War Shiny Ore per attack bonus
clanWar.glowyBonusAriaLabel: Clan War Glowy Ore per attack bonus
clanWar.starryBonusAriaLabel: Clan War Starry Ore per attack bonus

cwl.title: CWL
cwl.shinyBonusAriaLabel: CWL Shiny Ore per attack bonus
cwl.glowyBonusAriaLabel: CWL Glowy Ore per attack bonus
cwl.starryBonusAriaLabel: CWL Starry Ore per attack bonus

supercellEvents.title: Supercell Events
supercellEvents.noSchedule: The Supercell Events schedule for this year hasn't been officially announced yet. Check back later!
supercellEvents.concluded: This year's Supercell Events season has concluded. See you next year!
supercellEvents.bonusesUnknown: Resource bonuses during events are currently unknown.

prospector.title: Prospector
prospector.tooltipConsider: Consider using the prospector to balance the ores.

tips.addToPlanner: Add equipment to your priority list in the Planner tab to get dynamic conversion tips.
tips.changeTarget: Change your conversion target to finish faster.
tips.newBottleneck: For {upgradeInfo}, {source} will become your new bottleneck.
tips.slowestResource: Note: {other} is currently your slowest resource; converting other ores won't reduce total time.

settingsModal.title: Calendar Settings
settingsModal.firstDayOfWeekDesc: Choose when your week starts on the calendar.
settingsModal.showChipIconsDesc: Display icons for ores and leagues on chips.
settingsModal.autoPlaceScopeDesc: Decide if chips are placed for the month or year.

planner.noMoreChips: All chips for this month have already been placed on the calendar.

createCustomChipsModal.title: Create Custom Chips
createCustomChipsModal.globalOverrideDesc: Override income from supercell events globally.

planner.orderError: Error: Some equipment steps are not in the correct order.
planner.resolveErrorsToViewPlan: Resolve sequence errors to view the full plan.
planner.priorityPlaceholder: Your priority list is empty. Click on an equipment above to add an upgrade plan.
planner.confirmDeleteStep: Are you sure you want to remove this upgrade step ({equipment} to level {level}) from the priority list?
planner.confirmResetList: Are you sure you want to clear the entire priority list? This will remove all upgrade plans.
planner.noPriorityItems: No priority items set. Click "Edit" to add some.
planner.suggestionEpicUp: Move {futureItemName} up to finish sooner. You have extra Starry Ores.
planner.suggestionCommonUp: A Common equipment can be upgraded sooner if moved up, as the current Epic upgrade is waiting for Starry Ore.
planner.suggestionInterleave: Finish {itemNames} while waiting for {itemName} ores. No delay to your plan.
planner.confirmDeleteMonth: Are you sure you want to delete all chips placed in the current month?
planner.confirmDeleteAll: Are you sure you want to delete all chips from the calendar? This will also remove all unplaced custom chips.

settings.author: Author
settings.contactInfo: For questions, feedback, or feature suggestions, you can contact us at support@clashcalc.com. Click the button below to open your mail client.
settings.bugReportInfo: Alternatively, you can report the issue directly on our {link} page.
settings.bugReportPrivacyInfo: By submitting this report, you agree that your user data and the provided email address will be processed in accordance with our {link}.

runningCostsModal.title: Project Running Costs
runningCostsModal.disclaimer: These costs represent the gross hosting and infrastructure costs for running OreCalc on Google Cloud. You can support the project on Buy Me a Coffee.

settings.completeDeleteInfo: This will verify your ownership using the official Clash of Clans API. Once verified, we will permanently remove this player tag from all associated OreCalc user IDs across our entire database. Nobody will be able to add your account without re-verification.

options.uuidAttachmentInfo: Your unique User ID (UUID) is always attached to help us identify your session.
options.bugDescPlaceholder: Please describe the issue in detail...

settings.cloudSyncInfo: Sync your data across devices. Clash of Clans API remains active.
settings.globalPricingDesc: Configure custom prices for your currency.

globalPricingModal.title: Global Pricing
globalPricingModal.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel? Any unsaved changes will be lost.

status.updatePrompt: A new version of the application is available. Reload to get the latest features and fixes.

download.title: Download Your Data
download.description: This will export your entire application state (players, equipment, planner) into a JSON file. You can use this file to backup your progress or import it on another device.

alerts.noPlayerToRefresh: No player tag selected to refresh.
alerts.clipboardUnsupported: Clipboard API not supported or accessible in this browser/context.
alerts.invalidUserIdClipboard: Invalid User ID format in clipboard.
alerts.clipboardNoText: No text found in clipboard. Please enter User ID manually.
alerts.clipboardDenied: Clipboard access denied or failed. Please enter User ID manually.
alerts.importNoData: No data found for that User ID.
alerts.importEmpty: Please enter a User ID to import.
alerts.saveDefaultOnly: Cannot save to cloud: Only default player tag exists.
alerts.versionOutdatedReset: Your saved data format is outdated. Data has been reset. The page will now reload.
alerts.resetSuccess: Data reset successful. The page will now reload.
alerts.resetFailedWarning:
Data was not reset. You may experience compatibility issues.
You can reset your data anytime from the Settings tab.
alerts.saveFailed: Failed to save data to cloud: {error}
alerts.globalErasureSuccess: Player verified! Your player tag has been locked from our systems right away, and almost all data has been deleted. Any attempts to add it in the future will require verification. Any stray data left anywhere for the player tag provided will be removed in the next 30 days.
alerts.bugReportSuccess: Bug report submitted successfully! Thank you for your feedback.
alerts.bugReportFailure: Failed to submit bug report. Please try again later.

confirms.externalLink: You are about to leave the application and visit an external website. Do you want to continue?
confirms.mailtoLink: You are about to open your default mail client to send an email. Do you want to continue?
confirms.resetAll: Are you sure you want to erase all your data? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
confirms.resetGlobalPricing: Are you sure you want to reset custom pricing for this currency? This will restore the default store prices.
confirms.cloudSync: Newer data is available on the cloud. Do you want to sync?
confirms.importOverwrite: Import data for User ID {userId}? This will overwrite your current data.
confirms.importSameId: User ID {userId} is already active on this device. To sync, paste it on another device. Load anyway?
confirms.cloudSyncOptOut: Opting out of data sync will cause this device to stop synchronizing with others. You may lose data if not backed up manually. Proceed?

validation.invalidRevert: Invalid. Reverting to last valid value.
validation.prospectorSameOre: From and To ores cannot be the same.
validation.prospectorZeroAmount: Both Prospector amounts must be greater than 0.

errors.invalidChar: Invalid character entered: "{char}". Valid characters are: {validChars}
errors.invalidServerData: Invalid or incomplete data received from the server.
errors.duplicateCustomType: A custom chip of this type already exists.
errors.atLeastOneOreRequired: At least one ore amount must be greater than 0.
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please reload the page.
errors.bugDescriptionRequired: Please enter a description of at least 20 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address or leave it empty.
errors.loadFailureMessage: OreCalc could not start because of a critical error during initialization.

apiErrors.403: Access denied. Missing or incorrect API token.
apiErrors.accessDenied: Access denied. Missing or incorrect API token.
apiErrors.404: Player not found. Please check the player tag.
apiErrors.notFound: Player not found. Please check the player tag.
apiErrors.429: Too many requests. Please try again later.
apiErrors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
apiErrors.500: Unknown error occurred on the Clash of Clans servers.
apiErrors.503: Clash of Clans servers are temporarily unavailable due to maintenance.
apiErrors.inMaintenance: Clash of Clans servers are temporarily unavailable due to maintenance.
apiErrors.rateLimitedWithTimeMinutes: Too many requests. Please try again after {minutes} minutes.
apiErrors.deletedUser: This user account has been permanently deleted.
apiErrors.offline: You are currently offline. Please check your internet connection.
apiErrors.serverOffline: Cannot connect to the API server. The server may be offline or under maintenance.
apiErrors.protectedTag: This account is protected. Verification is required to add it.
apiErrors.invalidToken: Verification failed. The API Token provided is invalid.

legal.title: Terms & Privacy Update
legal.description: Please review and accept our updated Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to continue using OreCalc.
legal.consentStatement: By clicking "Accept & Continue", you agree to our Terms of Use and acknowledge that you have read and agreed to our Privacy Policy.
legal.cloudSyncNoticeDesc: By enabling Cloud Synchronization, your settings and local calculator configurations will be securely stored on our servers to enable cross-device sync.
legal.cloudSyncNoticeAgree: Please review and agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to activate this feature.
